---
title: "Resources"
draft: true
# This page is offline for now. To bring it back: delete the "draft: true" line
# above, and restore the "Resources" entry in the navbar section of _quarto.yml.
listing:
  id: resources
  contents: data/resources.yml
  template: templates/resources.ejs
  sort: false
---

<span class="eyebrow">Open science</span>

I share code, replication materials, and research tooling where possible. Repositories are hosted on [GitHub](https://github.com/jlmberns) and [GitLab](https://gitlab.com/JBerns); entries below link to individual projects as they are released.

::: {#resources}
:::
